title: Onboard Generate — v3 Context Shape
description: Input schema for onboard:generate in onboard 3.x. v3 = v2 plus version:3 and an OPTIONAL top-level `research` object (canonical shape: onboard/schemas/research-dossier.json). The detailed `phases` definitions are inherited from context-shape-v2.json and validated by the generate adapter; this schema gates the version constant and accepts the research block. v2 is still accepted (research-absent mode); v1 is rejected.

version.description: Schema version. HARD-REQUIRED for the v3 path. v2 callers keep version:2 (validated against context-shape-v2.json); v1 is rejected.

phases.description: Inherits the v2 phase definitions; validated in detail by the generate adapter against context-shape-v2.json.

research.description: Optional synthesized research object. Canonical shape: onboard/schemas/research-dossier.json. Absent in research-absent (v2-adapter) mode.
